query: Tucker Carlson new third party FEC Form 1 Statement of Organization filing July August 2026 status
answer: Research complete. **Summary:** As of 2026-07-13, there is no evidence Tucker Carlson has filed an FEC Form 1 (Statement of Organization) for a new third party. All coverage (July 1–4, 2026) documents only his stated *intent* to "help build a third party," announced in a Columbia Journalism Review interview following his break with Trump and the GOP. FEC database searches turn up no associated committee (only unrelated "Tucker" committees tied to Antoine Tucker of the Bronx), and the most detailed article (NOTUS) explicitly notes no formal filing. Under FEC rules, a party committee must file Form 1 within 10 days of exceeding $1,000 in contributions/expenditures — a threshold that has not been reported as crossed. No mid-July or August 2026 filing developments were located.

sources.title: Tucker Carlson Is Starting a Third Party. Those Who've Tried Say: Good Luck!
sources.snippet: Article on Carlson's stated intent; does not mention any FEC filing, Form 1, or registration; emphasizes obstacles to party formation.

sources.title: Registering as a political party committee - FEC.gov
sources.snippet: Party committees must register within 10 days of exceeding $1,000 (state/national) or $5,000 (local) in contributions or expenditures in a calendar year.

sources.title: Registering a committee - FEC.gov
sources.snippet: House and Senate committees register using the Statement of Organization, Form 1.

sources.title: TUCKER FOR NEW YORK - committee overview - FEC.gov
sources.snippet: Unrelated committee tied to Antoine Tucker of the Bronx, NY, not Tucker Carlson.
